- Only void methods can doNothing()! Example of correct use of doNothing(): doNothing(). doThrow(new RuntimeException()) .when(mock).someVoidMethod(); Above means: someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called -
- 
org.mockito.exceptions.base.MockitoException: 

Only void methods can doNothing()!
Example of correct use of doNothing():
    doNothing().
    doThrow(new RuntimeException())
    .when(mock).someVoidMethod();
Above means:
someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called

testChatRepositorySaveFailureHandling 0.004 s
testMaxIntegerUserIdAndForumIdSubmission
+ - [ Detail ]
 0.002 s
- Only void methods can doNothing()! Example of correct use of doNothing(): doNothing(). doThrow(new RuntimeException()) .when(mock).someVoidMethod(); Above means: someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called -
- 
org.mockito.exceptions.base.MockitoException: 

Only void methods can doNothing()!
Example of correct use of doNothing():
    doNothing().
    doThrow(new RuntimeException())
    .when(mock).someVoidMethod();
Above means:
someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called

- Only void methods can doNothing()! Example of correct use of doNothing(): doNothing(). doThrow(new RuntimeException()) .when(mock).someVoidMethod(); Above means: someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called -
- 
org.mockito.exceptions.base.MockitoException: 

Only void methods can doNothing()!
Example of correct use of doNothing():
    doNothing().
    doThrow(new RuntimeException())
    .when(mock).someVoidMethod();
Above means:
someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called

testNegativeUserIdAndForumIdSubmission
+ - [ Detail ]
 0.001 s
- Only void methods can doNothing()! Example of correct use of doNothing(): doNothing(). doThrow(new RuntimeException()) .when(mock).someVoidMethod(); Above means: someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called -
- 
org.mockito.exceptions.base.MockitoException: 

Only void methods can doNothing()!
Example of correct use of doNothing():
    doNothing().
    doThrow(new RuntimeException())
    .when(mock).someVoidMethod();
Above means:
someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called
	at com.medeiros.SPRINGProject.Controllers.ForumControllerNewMessageTest.testNegativeUserIdAndForumIdSubmission(ForumControllerNewMessageTest.java:262)

testNullMessageSubmission
+ - [ Detail ]
 0.001 s
- Only void methods can doNothing()! Example of correct use of doNothing(): doNothing(). doThrow(new RuntimeException()) .when(mock).someVoidMethod(); Above means: someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called -
- 
org.mockito.exceptions.base.MockitoException: 

Only void methods can doNothing()!
Example of correct use of doNothing():
    doNothing().
    doThrow(new RuntimeException())
    .when(mock).someVoidMethod();
Above means:
someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called

MusicControllerCreateMusicTest

testCreateMusicWithNullMusicContent
+ - [ Detail ]
 0.003 s
- Only void methods can doNothing()! Example of correct use of doNothing(): doNothing(). doThrow(new RuntimeException()) .when(mock).someVoidMethod(); Above means: someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called -
- 
org.mockito.exceptions.base.MockitoException: 

Only void methods can doNothing()!
Example of correct use of doNothing():
    doNothing().
    doThrow(new RuntimeException())
    .when(mock).someVoidMethod();
Above means:
someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called

testCreateMusicWithSpecialNumericUserid
+ - [ Detail ]
 0.002 s
- Only void methods can doNothing()! Example of correct use of doNothing(): doNothing(). doThrow(new RuntimeException()) .when(mock).someVoidMethod(); Above means: someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called -
- 
org.mockito.exceptions.base.MockitoException: 

Only void methods can doNothing()!
Example of correct use of doNothing():
    doNothing().
    doThrow(new RuntimeException())
    .when(mock).someVoidMethod();
Above means:
someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called

testCreateMusicWithNullName
+ - [ Detail ]
 0.001 s
- Only void methods can doNothing()! Example of correct use of doNothing(): doNothing(). doThrow(new RuntimeException()) .when(mock).someVoidMethod(); Above means: someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called -
- 
org.mockito.exceptions.base.MockitoException: 

Only void methods can doNothing()!
Example of correct use of doNothing():
    doNothing().
    doThrow(new RuntimeException())
    .when(mock).someVoidMethod();
Above means:
someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called

-

- Only void methods can doNothing()! Example of correct use of doNothing(): doNothing(). doThrow(new RuntimeException()) .when(mock).someVoidMethod(); Above means: someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called -
- 
org.mockito.exceptions.base.MockitoException: 

Only void methods can doNothing()!
Example of correct use of doNothing():
    doNothing().
    doThrow(new RuntimeException())
    .when(mock).someVoidMethod();
Above means:
someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called

- null cannot be returned by getNumberOfLikes() getNumberOfLikes() should return int *** If you're unsure why you're getting above error read on. Due to the nature of the syntax above problem might occur because: 1. This exception *might* occur in wrongly written multi-threaded tests. Please refer to Mockito FAQ on limitations of concurrency testing. 2. A spy is stubbed using when(spy.foo()).then() syntax. It is safer to stub spies - - with doReturn|Throw() family of methods. More in javadocs for Mockito.spy() method. -
- 
org.mockito.exceptions.misusing.WrongTypeOfReturnValue: 

null cannot be returned by getNumberOfLikes()
getNumberOfLikes() should return int
***
If you're unsure why you're getting above error read on.
Due to the nature of the syntax above problem might occur because:
1. This exception *might* occur in wrongly written multi-threaded tests.
   Please refer to Mockito FAQ on limitations of concurrency testing.
2. A spy is stubbed using when(spy.foo()).then() syntax. It is safer to stub spies - 
   - with doReturn|Throw() family of methods. More in javadocs for Mockito.spy() method.

- Only void methods can doNothing()! Example of correct use of doNothing(): doNothing(). doThrow(new RuntimeException()) .when(mock).someVoidMethod(); Above means: someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called -
- 
org.mockito.exceptions.base.MockitoException: 

Only void methods can doNothing()!
Example of correct use of doNothing():
    doNothing().
    doThrow(new RuntimeException())
    .when(mock).someVoidMethod();
Above means:
someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called

- Only void methods can doNothing()! Example of correct use of doNothing(): doNothing(). doThrow(new RuntimeException()) .when(mock).someVoidMethod(); Above means: someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called -
- 
org.mockito.exceptions.base.MockitoException: 

Only void methods can doNothing()!
Example of correct use of doNothing():
    doNothing().
    doThrow(new RuntimeException())
    .when(mock).someVoidMethod();
Above means:
someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called

- Only void methods can doNothing()! Example of correct use of doNothing(): doNothing(). doThrow(new RuntimeException()) .when(mock).someVoidMethod(); Above means: someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called -
- 
org.mockito.exceptions.base.MockitoException: 

Only void methods can doNothing()!
Example of correct use of doNothing():
    doNothing().
    doThrow(new RuntimeException())
    .when(mock).someVoidMethod();
Above means:
someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called

-

    .when(mock).someVoidMethod();

- Only void methods can doNothing()! Example of correct use of doNothing(): doNothing(). doThrow(new RuntimeException()) .when(mock).someVoidMethod(); Above means: someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called -
- 
org.mockito.exceptions.base.MockitoException: 

Only void methods can doNothing()!
Example of correct use of doNothing():
    doNothing().
    doThrow(new RuntimeException())
    .when(mock).someVoidMethod();
Above means:
someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called

- String cannot be returned by getTimeNow() getTimeNow() should return LocalDateTime *** If you're unsure why you're getting above error read on. Due to the nature of the syntax above problem might occur because: 1. This exception *might* occur in wrongly written multi-threaded tests. Please refer to Mockito FAQ on limitations of concurrency testing. 2. A spy is stubbed using when(spy.foo()).then() syntax. It is safer to stub spies - - with doReturn|Throw() family of methods. More in javadocs for Mockito.spy() method. -

If you're unsure why you're getting above error read on.

   - with doReturn|Throw() family of methods. More in javadocs for Mockito.spy() method.
